name: Cream-Cheese Mocha Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Gradually add hot coffee to cocoa, stirring constantly; let stand until cool.
2. Cream butter and sugars until light and fluffy. Add egg yolks; beat until batter is thick.
3. Add the cooled coffee-and-cocoa mixture. Dissolve baking soda in sour cream.
4. Add alternately to sugar mixture with flour, beating well after each addition.
5. Fold in beaten egg whites. Pour batter into two well-greased and floured 9-inch cake pans.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 35-40 minutes or until done. Remove from pans and cool.
7. Prepare frosting as directed. Spread between cake layers, stack layers, and spread over sides and top of cake.
8. Score the top of the cake to indicate serving pieces using a ribbon edge piping tip and frosting-filled pastry bag.
Cream Cheese Frosting:
1. Beat cream cheese, butter, and vanilla until smooth.
2. Gradually add confectioners' sugar; beat until fluffy.
3. Yields 1 cup.
